make a procedural city

Plan:
Procedural city on a rectangular grid. Skeleton: PointGrid defines building lot centers. Each lot gets a Box building with randomized height/footprint driven by sliders. Streets are ground planes between lots. A central park plaza and a landmark tower anchor the composition. All dimensions derive from 5-6 top-level sliders so the whole city rescales coherently.
SKELETON: point "lotGrid" drives [building positions, street grid]; curve "mainAvenue" drives [central boulevard, landmark placement]
GENOME [procedural-city-grid, detail:high]: groundPlane shell; streetGrid repeated ×streetCount on groundPlane; building repeated ×buildingCount on lotGrid; centralPark focal on groundPlane; landmarkTower focal on centralPark

make a boeing 747

Plan:
Boeing 747 airliner: parametric wide-body with signature upper-deck hump, four underwing engines, swept wings with winglets, and conventional tail. All dimensions driven by 6-7 sliders.
SKELETON: curve "fuseSpine" drives [fuselage loft profiles, wing root attach, tail attach, engine pylons]; curve "wingSpar" drives [wing loft (root→tip), engine positions, winglet]; curve "hTailSpar" drives [horizontal stabilizer loft]; curve "vTailSpar" drives [vertical stabilizer loft]
GENOME [boeing-747-airliner, detail:high]: fuseMain shell; fuseUpper shell on fuseMain; wingL shell on fuseMain; wingR shell on fuseMain; engine1 repeated ×4 of engine on wingL; engine2 repeated ×4 of engine on wingR; hTail shell on fuseMain; vTail shell on fuseMain; gearMain detail on fuseMain; gearNose detail on fuseMain

Plan:
Boeing 747 airliner: parametric wide-body with signature upper-deck hump, four underwing engines, swept wings with winglets, and conventional tail. All dimensions driven by sliders.
